title: CHIWAVA 24PCS 1.8" Catnip Furry Cat Toys Ball Soft Pom Pom balls Kitten Chase Quiet Play Assorted Color
features: ❤ Made with Cotton Stuffed Filled Inside, Soft Furry Plush Outside.
❤ Lightweight, Easy to Chase Carry or Toss in the Air.
❤ Catnips Design, Appealing to Your Cat’s Natural Instincts & Extra Excitement.
❤ PomPom Balls are Perfectly sized to bat and carry. Ideal for exercise & Training Play.
❤ Package: 24PCS Per PDQ Box,Great for Interactive households Indoor and Activity Toys.
description: Product Description Product Features Lightweight Assorted Jingle Ball Ball with Bell Easy to Wipe Clean 1.8 Inch Soft Furry Cat Ball with Catnip Interactive and Activity Toys for Cat Kitten Chiwava Furry Pom Poms Balls with synthetic fur, touch soft, specially made for activity, interactive and silent play. Your cat can easily roll and chase the ball at night without making any noise and won’t keep you awake all night. The balls are lightweight, Cats will actually gently carry the ball in their mouth, hunting and chasing, can bounce and toss in the air when being batted or kicked.stimulate your cat’s natural playful instincts, provide hours of entertainment & eliminate the boredom.
